src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta EE compatible Hibernate5JakartaModule to support the namespace shift in Spring Boot 3.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import, likely due to the removal of the zalando-problem library or a change in how problems are handled in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: remove import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; remove @Bean public ProblemModule problemModule()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import, consistent with the removal of the zalando-problem library dependencies.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: remove import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; remove @Bean public ConstraintViolationProblemModule constraintViolationProblemModule()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new label filter API.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support the new method security architecture in Spring Security 5.7+.
Replace deprecated antMatchers in authorizeRequests with requestMatchers in authorizeHttpRequests to align with the new matcher API.
Update header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for content security policy, frame options, and permissions policy.
Replace custom problem support entry points with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to replace the custom JWT filter chain.
Replace the manual CorsFilter injection with a SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new ignoringRequestMatchers syntax within the lambda DSL.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
